a:T2b4f,<div class="specification">
<p>While heating solid cholesteryl benzoate, Reinitzer discovered the liquid crystal phase.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline <strong>two</strong> observations that he could have made.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The structure of biphenyl nitrile is shown.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>Describe, giving a reason, a feature of the molecular structure, other than its polarity, that allows biphenyl nitrile to show liquid crystal behaviour.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Arc discharge, consisting of two inert metal electrodes in a liquid solvent, is one method of producing carbon nanotubes (CNTs).</p>
<p>Predict, giving a reason, the electrode at which the solvent cyclohexane, C<sub>6</sub>H<sub>12</sub>, will decompose to form CNTs.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>b:T6e2,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><em>Any two of:</em></p>
<p>cloudy/foggy/hazy phase «at first melting point» ✔</p>
<p>clear liquid phase «at second melting point/higher temperature» ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p>two «different» melting points</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>new phase observed over a wide temperature range ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Accept “exhibit both liquid and solid properties at the same time” for M3.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><em><strong>ALTERNATIVE 1:</strong></em></p>
<p>«bulky/long» C<sub>5</sub>H<sub>11</sub>/R/alkyl «group/chain» <em><strong>AND</strong> </em>prevents molecules from packing closer together «to form solid state» ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em><strong>ALTERNATIVE 2:</strong></em></p>
<p>biphenyl «fragment»/two benzene rings/two aromatic rings <em><strong>AND</strong> </em>«makes molecule» rigid/rod-shaped ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Accept “rigid/rod-shaped molecule, so aligns with other molecules” for <strong>ALTERNATIVE 2</strong>.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>«average» oxidation state of C in C<sub>6</sub>H<sub>12</sub>/cyclohexane = –2 <em><strong>AND</strong> </em>in CNTs = 0</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>oxidation state of C in CNTs is higher than in C<sub>6</sub>H<sub>12</sub>/cyclohexane</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>loss of H’s/hydrogens ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p>«oxidation at» anode/positive/+ «electrode» ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Accept “oxidation number” for “oxidation state”.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","a"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.SL.TZ0.4"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","a-4-liquid-crystals, a-6-nanotechnology"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
